parsed_review.summary: CP00-610 is a descriptor-only closeout pack (150 RP20 units, RP20.P00.M00.S01-RP20.P01.M02.S08, risk C) bootstrapping the RP20 "Data Room And VDR" program (M&A room, RFI, CP, closing binder, access analytics) contract+package+validator and handing off to CP00-611 (RP20.P01.M02.S09). It is the current first live pack: docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json sets actual_first_planned_pack_id/generated_pack_start_pack_id=CP00-610 (risk C, unit_count 150, matching range), so the baseline trusts the live queue. The pack correctly claims production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status in_progress, implementation_layer descriptor in both manifest.json and command-evidence.json — no over-claim of production readiness or enterprise trust, consistent with the standing directive never to weaken production_ready gates. The validators' production_ready_candidate:true is a clearly-scoped candidate flag, not a final production_ready assertion. Verified all 10 required public exports exist and are descriptor-only: DATA_ROOM_VDR_CORE_PROGRAM_CONTRACT/CP610_PACK_BINDING/CP610_REQUIREMENTS in registry.js; the case-set/descriptor builders in service.js; validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp610Coverage, the descriptor validator, and the Hermes/Claude/Closeout packet builders in validators.js. Coverage reconciles across review-baseline included_units, registry CP610_SECTION_ROWS, validators, the 3 model.test.js tests, manifest delivery_counts/micro_phase_row_counts, and the contract projection: 150 covered_units, 14 sections, deliverable distribution implementation 108 / contract 8 / security_audit 16 / hermes_evidence 7 / claude_review 3 / ui 8, and per-section row counts (M00=3,M01=3,M02=10,M03=20,M04=13,M05=20,M06=10,M07=20,M08=10,M09=10,M10=3,P01.M00=10,P01.M01=10,P01.M02=8). Title-based deliverable typing in service.js (dataRoomVdrCoreDeliverableType) matches the baseline per-unit deliverable_type (e.g., Receipt shape->hermes_evidence, State transition map/Required field registry/Package directory layout->ui, Claude review prompts->claude_review). Tests draw the plan pack from the live closeout-pack-plan.json (manifest snapshot only as fallback) and assert coverage, runtime-closed boundaries, and a full contract deep-equality; scripts/validate-rp20-data-room-vdr-core-contract.mjs (wired as package.json rp20:data-room-vdr-core:validate) deep-equals contract program/projections/no_write_attestation/descriptor against code. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: freezeCp610Result forces every runtime/dispatch/write/storage/audit/Hermes-receipt flag false and synthetic_only/no_real_data/omits_unauthorized_data true, backed by the comprehensive CP610_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and the nine required_no_leak_guards. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer (allowed_claude_tools Read/Grep/Glob; descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, asserted by the validator). Hermes patterns are confined to the deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false; receipt_shape descriptor_only_data_room_vdr_scope_contract_foundation_no_write; program runtime_opened=false; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). CP178+ review hardening guards are enumerated in forbidden_review_evidence (not_logged_in, zero_byte_output, malformed_json, fenced_json_only, tool_call_shaped_output, missing_raw_output, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, enterprise_trust_claim); readiness-report auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1449-byte valid JSON stdout) with no preserved invalid attempts for this pack and prompt 2471 bytes (no full diff/source). The docs/ldip-integration/.../c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json and other dirty files (UI progress-control-room, workbook/* docs, the docx) are correctly listed as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and were not treated as in-scope. One non-blocking P3: command-evidence.json currently records commands:[] with hermes_gate.status "pending" and gate_outcome "pending_review" — the expected pre-closeout/pre-review state (unlike closed CP00-609, whose evidence captured all validation commands at exit 0), and not a production-readiness over-claim, but the listed validation commands and Hermes gate H20 must be executed/captured at exit 0 before production_ready is flipped true and the pack closes. No P0/P1/P2 findings; nothing in this review blocks pack or goal closeout. Final human approval and any enterprise-trust closure remain outside this read-only review receipt.

findings.title: Pre-review command-evidence is unpopulated (commands [], Hermes gate pending) at review time
findings.details: command-evidence.json records "commands": [] with hermes_gate.status "pending" (command_ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, spec_requirement_validate), gate_outcome "pending_review", and production_ready false. Unlike the closed CP00-609, whose command-evidence captured all node --check/--test, rp19/weighted/spec/rp00/rp05/goal/fullplan validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, and git diff --check at exit 0, CP00-610 has no captured local/Hermes validation evidence yet. This is consistent with the honest pre-closeout state (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status in_progress) and is NOT a production-readiness or enterprise-trust over-claim, so it does not block this read-only review. The source itself (registry/service/validators/tests/contract/validator) is internally consistent and the validation gate is enforced by the post-review closeout automation, not by this review.
findings.recommendation: During the post-review closeout sequence, execute and capture all listed validation commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp05:matter-core:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check, and rp20:data-room-vdr-core:validate) at exit 0 and flip hermes_gate H20 / gate_outcome to passed before setting production_ready true. Do not close the pack on the empty command-evidence.
